channel.title: Belgian - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we head to the evil House Lannister, and the family that ruled Westeros at the conclusion of season two of the HBO hit series Game of Thrones! In collaboration with HBO, Brewery Ommegang created Iron Throne Blonde Ale to match the color of Lannisters’ hair . Brewed with noble […]

The post Brewery Ommegang: Iron Throne, Ep. 185 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Flying Dog Brewery: Raging Bitch, Ep. 159
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week, Beer America TV goes Belgo, as in Belgian IPA! This relatively new style of beer seems to be growing in popularity and Flying Dog has a good one in the form of a Raging Bitch! Pulled from their Canis Major series of beers, which are normally reserved for one-offs and special editions, Raging […]

The post Flying Dog Brewery: Raging Bitch, Ep. 159 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: New Belgium Abbey – Ep. 151
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV has reviewed several beers from New Belgium and it’s always a treat to say the least! This week we dive into New Belgiums Abbey, which is a Belgian dubbel (or double) brewed with six different malts and an authentic Belgian yeast strain. Abbey is bottle-conditioned and the Winner of four World Beer […]

The post New Belgium Abbey – Ep. 151 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan White, Ep. 97
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As we continue our tasting of the Alaskan Breweries line up of beers, this week we try Alaskan White, a Belgian style witbeir. True to the style, Alaskan White is flavored with coriander, citrus, and a secret spice. Very refreshing, this beer is very easy to drink with a lower ABV of 5.3% . Once […]

The post Alaskan Brewing Company – Alaskan White, Ep. 97 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Bruery: Autumn Maple, Ep. 83
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Autumn Maple from The Bruery is a different take on a pumpkin beer . Brewed with 17 pounds of yams per barrel, Autumn Maple has cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, vanilla, molasses, and maple syrup, and fermented with their traditional Belgian yeast strain, this is a bold and spicy beer and would be perfect to enjoy on […]

The post The Bruery: Autumn Maple, Ep. 83 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Brewery Ommegang, Ommegeddon, Ep. 71
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Brewery Ommegang has done it again with a Belgian-style ale that has a wild twist – a dose of Brettanomyces yeast and a blast of dry hopping . It’s a strong blonde ale with a sharp citrus flavor that, like the other Ommegang ales, has a dry finish. Its dryness and funkiness begat the name […]

The post Brewery Ommegang, Ommegeddon, Ep. 71 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Allagash – Interlude 2008, Ep. 68
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
The first beer produced for their “experimental series”, Allagash Interlude 2008 almost got dumped down the drain before it was finished . This Belgian style ale, as they put it, “pushes the limits of beer.” Aged in French Merlot and Sirah oak barrels, makes this beer a truly unique and bold tasting experience. In 2008 […]

The post Allagash – Interlude 2008, Ep. 68 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Terrapin Side Project – Monk’s Revenge, Ep. 53
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Volume 5 of the Terrapin Side Project brings us Monk’s Revenge, a big Belgian IPA that has a malt bill of a Belgian Tripel and a hop bill of a Belgian IPA . Also known as the “Big Nasty”, this one time release is tasty and dangerous. Get your hands on it now while you […]

The post Terrapin Side Project – Monk’s Revenge, Ep. 53 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
